observation.new_content:
model: Vehicle
slug: vehicles
table: vehicles

options:
  belongs_to_organization: true
  soft_deletes: false
  audit_trail: false
  pagination: true
  per_page: 25

columns:
  license_plate:
    type: string
    nullable: false
    searchable: true
    filterable: true
  make:
    type: string
    nullable: true
    searchable: true
  model:
    type: string
    nullable: true
    searchable: true
  color:
    type: string
    nullable: true
  vehicle_type:
    type: string
    default: "car"
    filterable: true
  user_id:
    type: foreignId
    foreign_model: User
    index: true

relationships:
  - type: belongsTo
    model: Organization
  - type: belongsTo
    model: User
  - type: hasMany
    model: Reservation
    dependent: destroy

permissions:
  admin:
    actions: [index, show, store, update, destroy]
    show_fields: "*"
    create_fields: "*"
    update_fields: "*"
  manager:
    actions: [index, show]
    show_fields: "*"
    create_fields: []
    update_fields: []
  member:
    actions: [index, show, store, update]
    show_fields: "*"
    create_fields: [license_plate, make, model, color, vehicle_type, user_id]
    update_fields: [license_plate, make, model, color, vehicle_type, user_id]
